title: Basic Operational Concepts of a CPU
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental fetch-decode-execute cycle and data flow between key components of a computer during program execution.
relationships: PC provides address to MAR for fetch
MAR accesses instruction from Main Memory
Fetched instruction is placed in MBR
Control Unit decodes instruction in IR
Control Unit sends signals to ALU to execute
ALU performs operation using data from AC/Memory
Result stored back in AC or Memory
